title: Search / Find Feature on Public Facing Board
excerpt: We will be creating a list of restaurants and sharing it with the members of our Facebook group. They will need to search among over 500 restaurants. Does Monday offer this ability?

posts.author: AskQuestions (KarenHowell)
posts.cookedHtml: We will be creating a list of restaurants and sharing it with the members of our Facebook group. They will need to search among over 500 restaurants. Does Monday offer this ability?

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AskQuestions

I assume you found a workaround in the meantime. Though one year has passed by, I’m not aware of such a native search feature for publicy shared boards.

But your use case seems to perfectly match our latest app Board to Website Widget, which lets you transform a board into a share- or embeddable public facing widget. And it does include the option to let its viewers search all that published data out of the box.

Just in case you read this, let me know what you think.

– Markus
